translationDisclaimer: Turjumaaddan waxaa laguu diyaariyay si ay kuugu fududaato. Haddii khilaaf jiro, nooca Ingiriisiga ah ee siyaasaddaan ayaa la raaci doonaa.
lastUpdated: Markii ugu dambeysay la cusbooneysiiyay: Abriil 2026
privacyDataWeCollect: BicycleRepairStations.com ma u baahna akoonno isticmaale mana aruuriso macluumaad shakhsi ah oo si toos ah loo aqoonsan karo. Cookies xayeysiis ah lama isticmaalo. Dhacdooyinka isticmaalka iyo waxqabadka aan la aqoonsan karin waxaa lagu aruuriyaa Vercel Analytics iyo Vercel Speed Insights, oo ay ku jiraan dhacdooyinka wada-xidhiidhka guud sida ficillada wadaagista.
privacyLocation: Haddii aad oggolaato ogolaanshaha goobta, isku-duweyaashaada waxaa kaliya loo isticmaalaa in lagu bartileyo khariidadda oo lagu helo saldhigyo kuu dhow. Goobta waligeed looma diro serveradayada — gabi ahaanba browserkaaga ayaa lagu habeeyaa waxaana la tirtiryaa markaad abka xidhid.
privacyIpGeolocation: Marka goob-sheegidda browserku la diiday ama la heli karin, abku wuxuu isticmaalaa cinwaankaaga IP-ga si uu u go'aamiyo goobta qiyaastii ee juquraafigaaga si uu khariidadda kuugu bartileyo agagaarkaaga oo uu ku soo jeediyoy luqad iyo cutubka masaafada ee la doorbidayo. Habeysiintan waxay ku salaysan tahay danaynta sharciga ah (GDPR Art. 6(1)(f)). IP-ga waxaa habeeyaa hawsha darfaha ee Vercel; cinwaanno IP ah ma keydin ama diiwaangelin abkan. Luqadda iyo cutubka doorashada wakhti kasta ayaad ka beddeli kartaa liiska dejinta.
privacyLocalStorage: Dejintaada doorashada (cutubka masaafada, muuqaalka midabka, luqadda) waxaa lagu kaydiyaa kaydinta gudaha ee browserkaaga si ay u sii jiraan booqashooyin kala duwan. Xogtani waligeed ka baxdo qalabkaaga.
privacySharing: Haddii aad isticmaasho qalabka wadaagista ee abka, xiriiriyayaashu waxay ku dari karaan cabbiraadyada ololaha (tusaale ahaan calaamadaha source/medium/campaign) si loo cabbirro isha taraafikada guud. Nuxurka aad dooratid inaad wadaagtid ayaa si toos ah adiga kaa imanaya goobta, abka, ama macmiilka iimaylka la xushay iyagoo hoos yimaada shuruudaha sirta ee adeegga laftiisa.
privacyThirdParty: Sawirrada taayilasha khariidadda waxaa laga soo rariyaa CARTO, ESRI, Stadia Maps, iyo serveradaha OpenStreetMap. Bixiyayaashani waxay diiwaan gelin karaan cinwaankaaga IP-ga qayb ahaan hawlgalka caadiga ah ee web-serfarka. Xogta saldhigyada waxaa laga soo qaadaa Overpass API. Raadinta goobta waxay isticmaashaa adeegga geocoding-ga ee Nominatim. Dhacdooyinka daawashada boggaga, waxqabadka, iyo isdhexgalka aan la aqoonsan karin waxaa aruuriya Vercel Analytics iyo Vercel Speed Insights. Markaad dooratid ficillada wadaagista, xiriiriyayaashu waxay ku furi karaan goobaha dhinaca saddexaad (tusaale ahaan X, Facebook, bixiyayaasha iimaylka, ama bartilmaameedyada wadaagista qalabka asalka ah). Fadlan tixraac siyaasadda sirta iyo shuruudaha bixiye kasta si aad faahfaahin u hesho.
privacyChildren: Adeeggan looma jeediyo carruurta ka yar 13. Si ula kac ah xog carruur ah kama aruurino.
privacyContact: Su'aalaha ku saabsan siyaasaddaan waxaa loo diri karaa cinwaanka ku qoran BicycleRepairStations.com.
termsAcceptance: Adiga oo isticmaalaya BicycleRepairStations.com waxaad ogolaatay shuruudahan. Haddii aadan oggolayn, jooji isticmaalka adeegga.
termsService: Abkan wuxuu kaa caawiyaa inaad hesho saldhigyada dayactirka baaskiilka ee dadweynaha ee lagu khariidaday OpenStreetMap. Wuxuu sidoo kale ku jiraa qalab wadaagis ikhtiyaari ah oo loogu talagalay in xiriiriyayaasha abka lagu faafiyo marooyin shakhsi ah. Adeegga waxaa la bixiyaa bilaash ahaan oo ah qalab fududeyn ah oo loogu talagalay baaskiilleyda.
termsAccuracy: Xogta saldhigyada waxay ka timaadaa OpenStreetMap, oo ah xog ay bulsho wax ka bedesho. Macluumaadku wuxuu noqon karaa mid aan dhamaystirnayn, aan sax ahayn, ama duugoobay. Had iyo jeer xaqiiji in saldhig jiro oo shaqaynaya ka hor intaadan ku tiirsanayn dayactir. Mas'uuliyad kama qaadanno saldhigyo maqan, khalad loo calaamadiyay, ama aan shaqaynayn.
termsSharing: Haddii aad isticmaasho astaamaha wadaagista, waad ka mas'uul tahay waxa aad soo dhigatid iyo mesha aad ku soo dhigatid. Ha u isticmaalin adeegga spam, dhibaatayn, ama nuxur sharci darro ah. Waad ka mas'uul tahay u hoggaansanaanta shuruudaha goob kasta oo dhinac saddexaad ah ee aad wax ku wadaagto.
termsWarranty: Adeegga waxaa loo bixiyaa "siduu yahay" iyada oo aan damaanad nooc kasta ah lahayn, caddaan ah ama la jeediyo. Kama dammaanadqaadanno heli karnimada, saxnaanta, ama u qalanka ujeeddo gaar ah.
termsLiability: Inta uu sharcigu u ogol yahay, BicycleRepairStations.com iyo hawl-wadayaashiisa kama mas'uul noqon doonaan wax dhaawac ah oo toos ah, aan toos ahayn, lama filaan ah, ama ka dhasha isticmaalkaaga ama aadan isticmaali karin adeegga.
termsThirdParty: Taayilasha khariidadda, xogta saldhigyada, natiijooyinka geocoding-ga, iyo meelaha wadaagista ikhtiyaariga ah waxaa bixiya dhinacyada saddexaad. Shuruudahooda adeegga ayaa khuseeya.
termsChanges: Waxaan cusboonaysiin karnaa shuruudahan wakhti kasta. Sii wadista isticmaalka adeegga kadib marka isbedelladda la dhigo waxay ka dhigan tahay aqbalista shuruudaha la beddelay.
